subcodes.first_line: ...I eagerly anticipate the day when New York will become a blessed spot… Bless Thou, O King of Kings, the city of New York!
subcodes.first_line_orig: من منتظر آنم که نیویورک مبروک گردد و آوازهٴ ثبوت بر عهد و میثاق از آن شهر بآفاق رسد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
